title: Let Go Now
author: Karen Casey
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- A clenched fist opening into an open hand. Three objects falling from the open hand: WORRY, REGRET, ANGER. The OPENED hand is RED. -->
  <g transform="translate(800 1300)" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" text-anchor="middle">
    <!-- The hand outline: starts as a closed fist, opens to a flat palm. Drawn as a single line going from a closed shape to an open one. We draw the OPEN hand (RED). -->
    <g stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="3" fill="none" stroke-linejoin="round">
      <!-- Palm -->
      <path d="M -120 0 Q -120 -60 -60 -60 L 60 -60 Q 120 -60 120 0 L 120 100 Q 120 160 0 160 Q -120 160 -120 100 Z"/>
      <!-- Fingers open upward -->
      <path d="M -100 -60 L -100 -160 Q -100 -200 -70 -200 Q -40 -200 -40 -160 L -40 -60"/>
      <path d="M -30 -60 L -30 -200 Q -30 -240 0 -240 Q 30 -240 30 -200 L 30 -60"/>
      <path d="M 40 -60 L 40 -160 Q 40 -200 70 -200 Q 100 -200 100 -160 L 100 -60"/>
      <path d="M -120 0 L -120 60"/>
    </g>
    <!-- The three released words falling away from the hand -->
    <g font-size="24" font-weight="300" fill="#cccccc" letter-spacing="0.04em">
      <text x="-260" y="-300">WORRY</text>
      <text x="-260" y="-220" opacity="0.7">REGRET</text>
      <text x="-260" y="-140" opacity="0.5">ANGER</text>
    </g>
    <!-- Drifting lines to suggest motion -->
    <g stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1" fill="none" opacity="0.6">
      <line x1="-160" y1="-180" x2="-220" y2="-260"/>
      <line x1="-160" y1="-100" x2="-220" y2="-180"/>
      <line x1="-160" y1="-20" x2="-220" y2="-100"/>
    </g>
    <!-- The hand label -->
    <text x="0" y="240" text-anchor="middle" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#fc1c46" letter-spacing="0.18em">OPEN</text>
  </g>
</svg>
rationale: An open hand in RED, three words (WORRY, REGRET, ANGER) drifting away. The hand that was a fist is now open — letting go IS the cover. 360px whisper title centered.
